name: recoil_app_destructor
description: RecoilApp::Destructor cleans the embedded FMV states, restores embedded state vtables to RecoilStateBase, and chains to the MFC/OLE base destructor.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 COFF byte compare fails with 146 unmasked mismatches after masking 16 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 168 bytes and the VC object body is 96 bytes with 2 trailing VC NOPs trimmed.

The byte drift starts at the function entry because the original emits an EH registration frame for destructor cleanup, while the current VC object body does not reproduce that prologue and cleanup-state shape under the selected profile.
The native smoke constructs a RecoilApp, checks constructor-installed vtables, calls RecoilApp::Destructor, and verifies that all embedded state vtables are restored to RecoilStateBase.
